meta.title: Acme — Product Update Sample
meta.preheader: A sample newsletter showing the header, intro card, spotlight pill, numbered sections, finding cards, and footer.
meta.headline: Sample Newsletter Headline Goes Here

intro.text: This is the **intro card**. Use it for a one or two sentence summary of the update, with **key terms bolded** so they stand out at a glance.

sections.heading: First Feature Heading
sections.body: Describe the first feature here. Body text supports **bold** for emphasis, and you can follow it with a bulleted list:
bullets: **Bullet label:** supporting detail for the first point.
**Third label:** one more line of detail.

sections.heading: Second Feature Heading
sections.body: A second section can include more than one screenshot. Each entry in the images array renders full-width, stacked.
bullets: **Immediate value:** what the reader can do right now.

sections.heading: Third Feature Heading
sections.body: Plain sections work too — a heading, some body copy, and a single screenshot.

sections.heading: Finding Cards Example
sections.body: Sections can also render **finding cards** — an icon in a colored box next to a label and description, grouped under a product logo.

cards.title: First card title:
cards.body: A short description of the first item in this category.

cards.title: Second card title:
cards.body: A short description of the second item in this category.

cards.title: Third card title:
cards.body: A short description of the third item in this category.

cards.title: Fourth card title:
cards.body: A short description of the fourth item.

cards.title: Fifth card title:
cards.body: A short description of the fifth item.

cards.title: Sixth card title:
cards.body: A short description of the sixth item.

footer.body: Closing call-to-action goes here — point the reader to wherever you want them to go next.
footer.legal: You received this email because you subscribed to our updates. If you'd prefer not to receive these, you can {% unsubscribe %}.
